_: Per-station interchange buffer in minutes. Replaces the previous flat 3-min / 5-min constants with per-station values, so journeys through bigger / busier interchanges (Clapham Junction, Reading, KX) get more realistic transfer times. Stations not listed fall through to `default`. Sources: public Trainline / NRE Minimum Connection Time data + sanity checks for station-redevelopment realities (London Bridge post-2018, Reading post-2014). Long-term replacement: the official MCT feed in National Rail's TTIS distribution.
